name: Imricor Medical Systems Inc.
analysis: It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.8100, stop A$1.5840, target A$2.0200 (0.93:1) — then trail it.
